## Identity

A salt-flat boy who watched the granary burn and, separately, stood in the
ranks at Wrackmoor counting hulls before the beach rout started. Nobody
asked him to fight. He fought anyway, which is exactly the kind of detail
that falls through the cracks of both role-edge taxonomies the engine uses.
